zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron於1283年5月20日出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron29歲，母親Mary Campbell24歲。他於1310年之前與Ellen Mowat of Montealto在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1338年11月7日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾笛卡爾 斯康。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron于1283年5月20日出生在苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron29岁，母亲Mary Campbell24岁。他于1310年之前与Ellen Mowat of Montealto在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1338年11月7日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾笛卡爾 斯康。

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Laird
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: status name for a landlord or landowner, from northern Middle English laverd ‘lord’.

variants.name: Leard
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Laird  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron was born on 20 May 1283, in Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron, was 29 and his mother, Mary Campbell, was 24. He married Ellen Mowat of Montealto before 1310, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 7 November 1338, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.Ballegarno Castle, Ballegarno, Perth, Sc: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron est né le 20 mai 1283, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mary Campbell, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Mowat of Montealto avant 1310, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 7 novembre 1338, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Old Scone, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.Ballegarno Castle, Ballegarno, Perth, Sc: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron am 20. Mai 1283 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron 29 und seine Mutter Mary Campbell 24. Er hat vor 1310 in Scotland Ellen Mowat of Montealto geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 7. November 1338 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron è nato il il 20 maggio 1283 nel Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mary Campbell, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Mowat of Montealto prima del 1310, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 7 novembre 1338, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameronが1283年5月20日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameronは29歳，母Mary Campbellは24歳であった。1310年以前にスコットランドでEllen Mowat of Montealtoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1338年11月7日に故郷で55歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアオルド スコンにて埋葬された。

ko.Ballegarno Castle, Ballegarno, Perth, Sc: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 퍼스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron(이)가 1283년 5월 20일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Campbell(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1310년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Ellen Mowat of Montealto(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1338년 11월 7일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 드 스콘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron nasceu em 20 de maio de 1283, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mary Campbell, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Mowat of Montealto antes 1310, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de novembro de 1338, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.Ballegarno Castle, Ballegarno, Perth, Sc: пирт, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron родился 20 мая 1283 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Campbell, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Mowat of Montealto перед 1310 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 7 ноября 1338 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности олд скоун, пиртшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Ellen Mowat of Montealto antes de 1310, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 7 de noviembre de 1338, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.
